description: Health subsidiary of PZU (Poland's largest insurer) providing comprehensive health insurance and telemedicine services to Polish employers and individuals. Combines insurance with digital health services.
business_model: B2B2C - Health insurance sold through employers to employees
target_market: Polish employers and individuals seeking private health coverage
competitive_advantage: Backed by Poland's largest insurer, comprehensive coverage, established provider network

varden_fit.rationale: Potential insurance partner for Varden's occupational health services in Poland
